description_long: This is a standard aluminum can of Coca-Cola, featuring a cylindrical shape with a slightly concave bottom and a pull-tab opening on top. The can is predominantly red with bold white branding, including the iconic 'Coke' and 'Coca-Cola' logos in large, stylized fonts. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. Nutritional and product information, as well as a barcode, are printed in white on the back. The can appears unopened, with no visible dents or scratches, and the top is sealed with a metallic pull-tab. The overall design is instantly recognizable and typical of commercial soft drink cans found in urban environments.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with bold white branding and a metallic pull-tab top, featuring smooth, reflective surfaces and detailed product labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large vertical 'Coke' logo in white on a red background, with the metallic top and pull-tab visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white wave design and partial 'Coca-Cola' script, with less text detail visible.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the full 'Coca-Cola' script logo and some product information text.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the barcode, nutritional information, and smaller 'Coca-Cola' logo, with the can's volume indicated at the bottom.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Coke' and 'Coca-Cola' logos, white product information text, barcode, and volume marking on a red background; all branding is in bold, stylized fonts typical of Coca-Cola.
